message:
fix(ops): auto-create project/instance rows before FK-constrained inserts

insert_search_event_row and upsert_resource_sample insert into tables
with FK constraints referencing projects and instances. When called
from the simulator (or any first-time ingestion), the parent rows may
not exist yet, causing ForeignKeyViolation.

Added ensure_project_exists and ensure_instance_exists helpers that
check-then-insert parent rows before the constrained insert.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
